testcase.name: Get Demo 2

failure.message: Get2.feature:12 - status code was: 404, expected: 200, response time: 558, url: https://postman-echo.com/get%3Fname=Carlos&lastName=R%C3%ADos&Ig=carlos_riosm1983, response:

testcase.failure:
* url 'https://postman-echo.com' .......................................... passed * header Accept = 'application/json' ...................................... passed * def requestBody = read('request2.json') ................................. passed Given path '/get?name=Carlos&lastName=Ríos&Ig=carlos_riosm1983' ........... passed When method GET ........................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... failed
Stack Trace: com.intuit.karate.exception.KarateException: Get2.feature:12 - status code was: 404, expected: 200, response time: 558, url: https://postman-echo.com/get%3Fname=Carlos&lastName=R%C3%ADos&Ig=carlos_riosm1983, response: at ✽.Then status 200 (Get2.feature:12)
And print response ........................................................ skipped

testcase.name: Get Demo 2

failure.message: Get2.feature:17 - javascript evaluation failed: '/get, <eval>:1:5 Missing close quote '/get ^ in <eval> at line number 1 at column number 5
